title: Apparatus and method and computer program for retrieving a remote media content and vehicle or aircraft
abstract: An apparatus (100) for retrieving a remote media content owned by a user (150) to a vehicle (200) or an aircraft, comprises an authorization controller (1 10) for obtaining an access authorization from the user, the access authorization indicating that the authorization controller is authorized to access the remote media content; a detector (120) for detecting whether the user is located at or in the vehicle or the aircraft and for generating a detection result ( 125); and a media content retriever ( 130) for retrieving the remote media content using the access authorization when the detection result (125) indicates that the user (1 50) is located at or in the vehicle or the aircraft and for not retrieving the remote media content when the detection result (125) indicates that the user (150) is not located at or in the vehicle or aircraft.
claims:
Claims Claims Apparatus (100) for retrieving a remote media content owned by a user ( 150) to a vehicle (200) or an aircraft, comprising: an authorization controller (1 10) for obtaining an access authorization from the user, the access authorization indicating that the authorization controller is authorized to access the remote media content; a detector (120) for detecting whether the user is located at or in the vehicle or the aircraft and for generating a detection result (125); and a media content retriever (130) for retrieving the remote media content using the access authorization when the detection result (125) indicates that the user ( 150) is located at or in the vehicle or the aircraft and for not retrieving the remote media content when the detection result (125) indicates that the user (150) is not located at or in the vehicle or aircraft. Apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the detector (120) is configured to detect ( 121 ) a wireless connection to a mobile device ( 160) owned by the user (150) and wherein the detector ( 120) is configured to generate the detection result ( 125) based on whether the wireless connection exists or not. Apparatus of claim 1 or 2, wherein the detector (120) is configured to take (122) a photograph of a potential user, to access a data base based on the photograph and to generate the detection result ( 125) indicating that the potential user is located at or in the car or aircraft or not, depending on whether a match in the database was found or not. Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the detector ( 120) is configured to record (123) sound emitted by a potential user, to access a database based on the recorded sound and to generate 

 the detection result ( 125) indicating that the potential user is located at or in the car or aircraft or not, depending on whether a match in the database was found or not. 5. Apparatus of claim 2, wherein the detector (120) is configured to detect a disconnection event in which a disconnection of the mobile device ( 160) from the apparatus (100) occurs, and wherein the detector (120) is configured to only generate the detection result (125) indicating that the user is not located in or at the vehicle or aircraft within a predetermined time duration ( 127) since the disconnection event has passed and the user is still disconnected ( 128). 6. Apparatus of claim 5, wherein the predetermined time duration (127) is in a range between one second and twenty minutes. 7. Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the media content retriever ( 130) is configured to receive (131 ) a media stream from a remote streaming service, and wherein the media content receiver (130) is configured to stop (133) a currently existing media stream in response to a reception ( 132) of the detection result ( 125) indicating that the user (150) is not located at or in the vehicle or aircraft. 8. Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the authorization controller (1 0) is configured to obtain the access authorization in the form of an access token from an authorization server (180) linked to a remote service (1 90) handling the remote media content, and wherein the apparatus ( 100) for retrieving is configured to not store any user login credentials authorizing the user at the remote service (190). 9. Apparatus of claim 8, wherein the authorization controller (1 10) is configured to operate in accordance with a protocol as defined by an OAuth standard. 10. Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the authorization controller (1 10) is configured to detect a pairing of a mobile device to the apparatus (100) for retrieving or to a wireless network of the vehicle or aircraft, and wherein the detector (120) is configured to detect that the user is not located at or in the vehicle or aircraft anymore based on a disconnection event of the mobile device (160). Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the authorization controller (1 10) is configured to provide a group of supported remote services (202) to the user, and to receive a user selection indicating a selected remote service from the group (202) of supported services. Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the authorization controller ( 0) is configured to provide a group of authorization options (203) to the user device (160), the group comprising at least two of the following members: temporary authorization, permanent authorization, expiration of a temporary authorization in a limited time span to be input from the user (150), and expiration of a temporary authorization in case of leaving the vehicle or the aircraft, and to receive a user selection indicating a user specified authorization option, and 

 to activate the detector (120) or the media content retriever (130) when the user has selected the expiration of the temporary authentication in case of leaving the vehicle or the aircraft, wherein, in case of any other selection from the group, the media content retriever (130) is configured to retrieve the remote media content irrespective of any detection result (125) from the detector (120). 13. Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the media content retriever ( 30) is configured to browse, search or play back media content associated with an account of the user (150) at an online media service (190) handling the remote media content only when the access authorization is valid and when the detection result ( 120) indicates that the user (150) is located at or in the vehicle or aircraft. Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the authorization controller (1 10) is configured to receive a GET resource request from a user device (160), the user device (160) being a mobile device or a device connected to the vehicle or aircraft and having an interface for receiving a user input; to send an authorization request to the user device (160); to forward a GET authorization request from the user device (160) to an authorization server (180) associated with a service (190) for handling the remote media content; and to forward an authorization graphical user interface from the authorization server to the user device (160). Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the authorization controller ( 1 10) is configured 

 to forward user credentials from the user device (160) to the authorization server (180); to forward an authorization code from the authorization server (180) to the user device (160); to receive the authorization code from the user device (160); to request an access token as the access authorization from the authorization server (180); and to receive the access token from the authorization server (180). Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the media content retriever (130) is configured to check whether the detection result (120) indicates that the user is located at or in the vehicle or aircraft, and to only send a get resource request together with the access token as the access authorization to the authorization server (190) when the detection result (125) indicates that the user is located at or in the vehicle or aircraft. Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the media content retriever ( 130) is configured to receive the media content in response to sending the access token to the authorization server (180), and to present the received media content at or in the vehicle or aircraft to the user by rendering the media content using a display (1 70c) or one or more speakers (170a, 170b) or by transmitting the media content to the user device for rendering by the user device. Apparatus of one of the preceding claims, wherein the vehicle is a car. 

 wherein the apparatus is a car head unit, wherein the user has a mobile device ( 160), and wherein the detector (120) detects whether the user is in the car or not. Method of retrieving a remote media content owned by a user (150) to a vehicle (200) or an aircraft, comprising: obtaining (1 10) an access authorization from the user, the access authorization indicating that there is an authorization to access the remote media content; detecting (120) whether the user is located at or in the vehicle or the aircraft and generating a detection result (125); and retrieving ( 130) the remote media content using the access authorization when the detection result (125) indicates that the user ( 150) is located at or in the vehicle or the aircraft and for not retrieving the remote media content when the detection result (125) indicates that the user (150) is not located at or in the vehicle or aircraft. Vehicle or aircraft, comprising: a media presentation device (170a, 170b, 170c); the apparatus for retrieving a remote media content in accordance with any one of the claims 1 to 18, wherein the apparatus ( 100) for retrieving is configured to forward the remote media content to the media presentation device when a detection result ( 125) indicates that the user is located at or in the vehicle or aircraft, and to not forward the remote media content to the media presentation device or to control the media presentation device to not present the media content when a detection result indicates that the user is not located at or in the vehicle or aircraft. Vehicle or aircraft in accordance with claim 20, 

 wherein the vehicle is a car, a cab, a bus or a train or a water vehicle such as a boat, a ferry or a cruiser, or wherein the aircraft is a plane, a helicopter, a glider, an aerostat or air ship. 22. Method of operating a vehicle or an aircraft, comprising: performing a media presentation ( 170a, 170b, 1 70c); retrieving a remote media content in accordance with the method of claim 19, wherein the method of retrieving comprises forwarding the remote media content to the media presentation device, when a detection result (125) indicates that the user is located at or in the vehicle or aircraft, and not forwarding the remote media content to the media presentation step or to control the media presentation step to not present the media content, when a detection result indicates that the user is not located at or in the vehicle or aircraft. 23. Computer program for performing, when running on a computer or a processor, the method of one of claims 19 or 21 .
